steps.title: Use the namesake note
steps.content: The student's goal is to explain whom the award is named for. The relevant note says the A.M. Turing Award is named after groundbreaking British mathematician Alan Turing.

steps.title: Reject criteria and winner facts
steps.content: A and D focus on Amit Rao's 1994 award, while B explains what the award is given for. Those facts do not identify the namesake. The needed sentence names Alan Turing. The answer is C.
